goal_summary: Decoupled Claude runtime integration from dev-protocol core. Refactored architecture so .claude/ becomes an optional runtime adapter, not a protocol dependency. Updated README, onboarding, workflow-rules, commit-rules, goal-output-contract, goal-prompt-template, goal-workflow, and created runtime-integrations.md.
validation_results: PASS: case-06 validation passes on goal commit
PASS: README reframed as AI-assisted development protocol
PASS: docs/runtime-integrations.md created with architecture diagram
PASS: onboarding.md adds manual fallback workflow
PASS: workflow-rules.md maps slash commands to semantic operations
PASS: goal-output-contract.md describes Goal semantic, not /goal command
PASS: goal-prompt-template.md clarified for any runtime
PASS: goal-workflow.md mapped to semantic Goal operation
stop_reason: Implementation complete. Protocol core is now runtime-agnostic. .claude/ is explicitly documented as optional Claude Code convenience automation.
risks_followups: case-05 requires checkpoint state; will validate after running checkpoint
Future runtimes (Cursor, Copilot) need their own adapter docs when implemented

continuation_handoff.context: dev-protocol is now architecturally decoupled from Claude Code. The protocol core (scripts, tests, .agents/, docs/, references/) contains no runtime-specific logic. .claude/ is documented as an optional runtime adapter. All protocol correctness comes from deterministic scripts and tests, not hook behavior.
continuation_handoff.boundary: Only documentation and structural clarification changed. No modifications to fix-goal-output.ps1, case-05, case-06, checkpoint logic, or .agents/ structure. .claude/ was not moved; rationale documented in runtime-integrations.md.
continuation_handoff.next_candidate_goal: Add Cursor or VS Code integration prototype, or refine runtime-integrations.md with concrete adapter examples.
